title: Health Equals Size
description: Your size decreases the lower your health is. Absorption Effect increases your size, and your damage (slightly).
body:
### This Datapack uses the new "generic.scale" Attribute in the 23w51b snapshot. Changing the size and hitbox of entities.

**Health detection is in percentage, not your amount of hit points.** 

**The lower your Health, the smaller you get.**
Minimum size: -0.57x at 5% Health. (Decreasing at -0.03x for every 5% Health missing.)



**The Absorption Effect can take you OVER the 100% Health mark, going over the mark not only increases your size, but also slightly increases your Attack Damage.** 

Maximum size: +0.6x at 156% Health. (Increasing at +0.05x for every 5% Health over the 100% mark.) 

Damage (addition): +2 at 146% Health. (Increasing at +0.2 for every 5% Health over the 100% mark.)

Damage (multiply): +0.2x at 146% Health. (Increasing at +0.02x for every 5% Health over the 100% mark.)
